calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Julie Tang, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Jacqueline Chan, #10276.

Stephen L. Porter, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 100 Bush Corporation.
C.K. Kwan, president of 100 Bush Corporation, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by Wing Kun Kam King.
Default was entered against defendant on July 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 3, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 100 Bush Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Wing Kun Kam King, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $500,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,035.87.
Costs - $365.00, for a total of $502,400.87.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Continued To Jan-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
